*By authors*.We have estimated tritium decay either
by using the known 3-H cross section in Al or by
assuming equal cross sections for 3-H and 3-He when no
cross section were available. In most cases the
estimated amount of 3-He via 3-H decay, calculated by
either method, was less than 5% of the total, and in
all cases it was well within experimental errors of

/By authors/ The He cross sections reported here
represent the sum of 1/3 those for natural Ca and 2/3
those for F. Since the He cross sections for Ca or F
alone are not known, separation of the individual
yields is impossible at this time.
